# Count how many schools have enrollment of at least 2,000

# List of schools (row headers)

    "Augustana College (Illinois)",
    "Aurora University",
    "Beloit College",
    "Benedictine University",
    "Carthage College",
    "Concordia University Wisconsin",
    "University of Dubuque*",
    "Elmhurst College**",
    "Fontbonne University",
    "College of Mount St. Joseph",
    "North Central College"
]

# Count schools with enrollment >= 2000

for school in schools:
    enrollment = cell(school, enrollment_col)
    if enrollment is not None and enrollment >= 2000:
        count += 1

result = count
